overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a desert highway approach to Night City. The camera travels along a paved road through arid landscape with Joshua trees and scattered vegetation, passing various vehicles and large billboard structures before continuing toward the distant futuristic skyline under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway roadside with graffiti markings

events.description: camera begins moving forward along the highway after initial stationary view
a modified car with roof equipment drives past heading toward the city

agents.ego_description: traveling along the desert highway, observing various vehicles passing by in both directions

notable_agents.action: abandoned or stationary car visible on the roadside at the start of the segment

entered.detail: scattered Joshua trees and desert vegetation lining the left side of the highway
futuristic city skyline visible in the far distance across the desert
rocky mountain range forming the backdrop to the left of the city
colorful spray-painted graffiti markings on the asphalt surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway with scattered Joshua trees and a distant view of Night City's skyline. The camera begins moving forward along the asphalt, passing colorful graffiti on the pavement while various modified cars drive past in both directions. The bright midday sun illuminates the arid landscape and the mountains to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway approaching large billboard gate structures

events.description: a stream of vehicles passes by including a green car and a white sedan
large twin billboard structures become visible ahead marking the highway entrance

agents.ego_description: cruising along the highway, approaching the large billboard structures that mark the entrance to the city area

notable_agents.action: a green modified car passes by on the left side of the road heading toward the city

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers with plants lining both sides of the highway
massive twin billboard structures spanning across the highway ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera continues driving along the desert highway, now flanked by red and white striped barriers. Various vehicles pass by including a distinctive green car. In the distance, two massive billboard structures become visible, marking a gateway along the road toward Night City. The Joshua trees continue to dot the landscape on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway passing through large billboard gate structures

events.description: camera passes between the two massive billboard structures spanning the highway
a car passes directly underneath the billboard structures heading toward the city

agents.ego_description: passing through the billboard gate and continuing down the open highway

entered.detail: large billboard on the left displaying a red sports car advertisement with Japanese text
large billboard on the right displaying an anime-style character advertisement

segments.scene_description: The camera drives between the two massive billboard structures that form a gateway over the highway. The left billboard displays a red sports car advertisement while the right shows an anime character. After passing through, the road continues straight toward the distant city, with the red and white barriers now closer to the roadside. The landscape becomes more open as the Joshua trees recede behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway stretching toward distant metropolis

events.description: camera maintains steady speed along the long straight stretch of highway

agents.ego_description: cruising along the open highway with clear view of the city skyline ahead

entered.detail: long straight stretch of asphalt road extending toward the horizon and city

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the open highway stretching ahead toward Night City, now free of the billboard structures and barriers. The road runs straight through the barren desert landscape with mountains visible to the left. The futuristic skyline dominates the horizon as the camera continues driving forward at steady speed under the clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desert highway that transitions from a cluttered roadside environment into an open stretch leading toward a futuristic skyline. It begins by gliding over asphalt marked with colorful graffiti, passing modified cars and scattered Joshua trees under a bright midday sun. As the camera advances, red and white striped barriers flank the road and a distinctive green car passes by, while two massive billboard structures emerge in the distance to form a gateway. The scene then shifts as the camera drives directly between these billboards, passing a red sports car advertisement and an anime character before the barriers and trees recede. Finally, the road opens into a barren desert landscape with mountains to the left, leaving the highway clear as the camera drives steadily toward the dominating skyline of Night City under a clear blue sky.
